SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SHAUNA MATLIN-AGENT.DEFENDANT RUESSMAN'S AGENT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CURTIS, MATTHEW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RUESSMANN, LAURENT SHAUNA MATLIN, AS DEFENDANT LAURENT RUESMANN'S AGENT, WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. DEFENDANT JUDY KARAM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
